mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, user_id AS userId, lawyer_id AS lawyerId, service_type_id AS serviceTypeId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime, form_data AS formData FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT order_id AS orderId, user_id AS userId, lawyer_id AS lawyerId, service_type_id AS serviceTypeId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime, form_data AS formData FROM `order` WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.user_id AS userId, o.lawyer_id AS lawyerId, o.service_type_id AS serviceTypeId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status, o.created_time AS createdTime, o.updated_time AS updatedTime, o.form_data AS formData, v.real_name AS lawyerName FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN lawyer l ON o.lawyer_id = l.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications v ON l.user_id = v.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
